# Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card
  * Free 12-month Swiggy One membership upon activation*
  * 5% Cashback across Swiggy and select online spends*.
  * 1% CashBack on other spends*
TnCs Apply


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=SWCC#nbb "Apply Now")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pws-extra-4326-swiggy-orange-1920-x-500?fmt=webp)
What's in store for you
  * [Card Benefits & Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card#a "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Eligibility Criteria](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card#c "Eligibility Criteria")
  * [Documents Required to Apply](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card#d "Documents Required to Apply")
  * [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card#r "Frequently Asked Questions")
  


![](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/indianoil-card?fmt=webp-alpha)
### More rewards than ever before
Welcome Benefits
  * Complimentary Swiggy One Membership for 12 months as a welcome benefit.*


Swiggy Benefits
  * 5% Cashback across Swiggy and select online spends*


Credit Benefits
  * Get 1% CashBack on other eligible spends.*


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card#benefits "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### CashBack Benefits
  * 5% CashBack* on all eligible Swiggy app spends (Food orders, Instamart, and Dineout). For more details, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/5-percent-cashback-details-swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card.pdf).
  * 5% CashBack* on online spends across online Merchants. For the list of eligible Merchants and MCCs, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/5-percent-cashback-details-swiggy-ornge-credit-card.pdf).
  * 1% CashBack* on other categories. For more details, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/1-percent-cashback-details-swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card.pdf).
*T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Mastercard Golf Benefits
  * Enjoy access to golf courses worldwide along with 12 free golf lessons per year.
  * Get 4 complimentary green-fee rounds every calendar year.
  * Avail 50% discounted green fees on additional sessions beyond the complimentary quota.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://specials.priceless.com/en-in/offers/Mastercard_World_Card_India_Golf_Program?Oid=201902180041) for more details.
  * *T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Convert high-value transactions into [SmartEMI(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi) with ease after purchase.*
  * Enjoy fast and secure Contactless Payments* for a smoother checkout experience.
  * Stay protected with fraud liability cover on unauthorised Credit Card transactions.*
  * Enjoy the flexibility of revolving credit to pay your outstanding balance over time at a nominal interest rate.* Please refer to the Fees and Charges section to know more.
*T&C Apply.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Swiggy HDFC Bank Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** Min 21 years & Max 60 Years 
  * **Net Monthly Income:** **>** ₹20,000 


Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age** :Min 21 years & Max 65 Years
  * **Annual ITR** > ₹6 lakh per annum 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Know more about the card
  1. ### Fees and Charges
  2. ### Card Details
  3. ### CashBack Redemption
  4. ### Contactless Payment
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


#  Fees and Charges 
  * **Joining Fee / Renewal Membership Fee:** ₹500 + Applicable Charges
  * **Spend** ₹1,50,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off


  * **Exclusions for Spends of** ₹1,50,000 and above for eligibility of renewal year fee waiver are as follows:
    1. Cash on Call
    2. Balance Transfer
    3. Cash Withdrawal.
  * Limited Period Offer, [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/fyf-offer-tncs.pdf) for more details


[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/card-member-agreement-swiggy.pdf) for Card Member Agreement.
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Card Details 
Welcome Benefit
Swiggy One Membership is a premium subscription program for Swiggy users. It is a single membership that offers unlimited benefits across restaurants and Instamart orders on Swiggy, including free delivery and exclusive discounts from select restaurants. To get this membership, activate your Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card. 
Card Activation is done by following one or more below mentioned ways: 
  * Making a transaction using the Credit Card, 
  * To use the card via OTP or IVR, setting PIN for the card, and enabling card controls such as online transactions, enabling international transactions etc. 


For more details on card activation, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/activation-guidelines).
**Mastercard Golf Benefits**
Please follow below link to know how to redeem the benefits – 
  * **Link :** [Mastercard World Card India Golf Program | Priceless Specials(opens in a new tab)](https://specials.priceless.com/en-in/offers/Mastercard_World_Card_India_Golf_Program?Oid=201902180041)
  * **Customer Service Number:** +1800 102 6263 


**Interest-Free Credit Period**
Get up to 50 days of interest-free period on your Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card **Note:** The interest-free period begins only once the merchant submits the charge. 
**Zero Lost Card Liability**
In the unfortunate event that you lose your Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card, you will have zero liability on any fraudulent transactions, provided you report the loss immediately to our 24-hour call centre.
![Fuel Surcharge Waiver](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  CashBack Redemption 
  * Cashback earned for current billing cycle will be auto redeemed against outstanding amount.


  * For more details on Finance charges please refer to the **Most Important Terms and Conditions.**


  * To earn 5% CashBack using Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card, the cardholder should make a minimum transaction of ₹249 using the card.


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Contactless Payment 
Your Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient, and secure payments at retail outlets 
(**Note:** In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder has to enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons.)
![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *[The Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/tncs-swiggy-orange.pdf) for Product specific TnC
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/swiggy-ornge-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdf/combined-tncs-ornge-and-blck.pdf) for Combined TnCs


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
How can I get the renewal fee waived on the Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card?
Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in a year before your renewal date to get the next year’s renewal fee waived.
### 
How do I activate my Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card to avail benefits?
You can activate your card in any of the following ways:
⦁ Make your first transaction using the Credit Card
⦁ Authenticate using OTP or IVR
⦁ Set your card PIN
⦁ Enable card controls such as online or international transactions
Once activated, your CashBack earning and welcome benefits begin. For more details on card activation, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/activation-guidelines) .
### 
What welcome benefit do I get with the Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card?
You receive a 12-month complimentary Swiggy One membership, provided the card is activated through the required steps.
### 
What CashBack benefits are offered on the Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card?
You earn 5% CashBack on eligible Swiggy app spends, 5% Cashback on select online merchants and categories and 1% CashBack on all other categories, as per applicable terms and merchant eligibility.
### 
How is CashBack redeemed on the Swiggy Ornge HDFC Bank Credit Card?
CashBack is credited directly to your card account as statement credit, based on the CashBack cycle and applicable terms.
